title: The Sky, Sun and Moon
description: A hand-crafted resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s blocky sun and moon with beautifully curated circular celestial bodies for a more immersive sky.
body:
The Sky, Sun and Moon is a hand-crafted resource pack that transforms Minecraft’s sun and moon into beautifully detailed circular bodies. Every pixel is carefully curated to deliver a richer, more immersive sky—perfect for players seeking a subtle yet stunning enhancement to their world’s atmosphere. Whether basking in daylight or wandering under an otherworldly moon, your skies will never feel the same again.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
